query: MongoDB analytics ecosystem tools BI integration Tableau Power BI 2024
answer: Tableau and Power BI can integrate with MongoDB via the MongoDB Connector for BI, which requires a MongoDB Enterprise Advanced subscription or Atlas cluster. Both tools offer robust BI capabilities for data analysis.

results.title: MongoDB community version integration with Power BI/Tableau - Working with Data / Connectors & Integrations - MongoDB Community Hub
results.snippet: # MongoDB community version integration with Power BI/Tableau. can some one suggest how to integrate Mongo db community version with power BI/tableau ? * MongoDB BI Connector is it free? Power BI and Tableau currently do not have direct support for querying MongoDB. You need to setup an intermediary tool like the MongoDB Connector for BI, which provides a read-only SQL to MongoDB translation layer. The MongoDB Connector for BI is compatible with both Community & Enterprise editions of MongoDB, but is licensed as part of a MongoDB Enterprise Advanced subscription or available as an add-on for a dedicated MongoDB Atlas cluster (M10+). | MongoDB Spark Connector Performance issues in v10.x compared to v2.x  Connectors & Integrations | 0 | 302 | Apr 2025 |. | Fetch the data from Mongodb database  Connectors & Integrations | 0 | 188 | Jul 2025 |.
